intro.title: Elite Ship Management & Operational Services
intro.p1: Tom Shipping delivers premier ship management and maritime operational services tailored for the international cargo sector. Our comprehensive suite of services spans end-to-end ship management, marine operations, planned maintenance, strategic supply chain logistics, crew coordination, chartering, and rigorous fleet oversight.
intro.p2: Driven by a highly experienced leadership team, we are dedicated to delivering proactive, transparent, and optimal maritime standards.
intro.safetyDesc: Uncompromising adherence to global maritime regulations.
intro.commercialDesc: Strategic cost management and strict vessel efficiency controls.
intro.excellenceDesc: High-tier service standards aligned with international best practices.
intro.governanceDesc: Bulletproof documentation, total transparency, and proactive risk management.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To provide world-class ship management services centered on safety, transparency, and efficiency in the dry cargo sector.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: To be one of the most preferred and trusted ship management companies globally, powered by technology, sustainability, and operational excellence.

content.title: The Founding Philosophy of Tom Shipping
content.p1: Tom Shipping was founded by maritime professionals to address the demands for transparency, safety, and rigorous operational discipline in dry cargo management.
content.p2: Through advanced planned maintenance and real-time telemetry, we maintain the operational lifecycle and commercial output of our fleet at peak efficiency.
content.p3: Operating with strict environmental stewardship, we keep crew safety and marine protection at the heart of our strategy.

fleet.title: Our Fleet
fleet.subtitle: Ensuring Global Maritime Logistics with Modern and Maintained Vessels
fleet.intro: Our dry cargo fleet is maintained to the highest standards, ensuring top-tier operational reliability and safety in international trade, fully compliant with the latest IMO, MARPOL, and SOLAS requirements.
fleet.ismDesc: Vessels operate strictly under ISO-certified Safety Management Systems and security guidelines.
fleet.realtimeDesc: Vessel metrics are recorded continuously to control fuel metrics and track route schedules.

standards.p1: We oversee our vessels' technical performance using advanced fleet tracking and data-monitoring tools that deliver real-time metrics.
standards.p2: By collaborating with top-tier classification societies (IACS members), we guarantee proper vessel certification and consistently high performance during Port State Control (PSC) inspections.

sustainability.title: Sustainability & Safety
sustainability.subtitle: Safeguarding the Oceans and Providing Secure Work Environments for the Future
sustainability.hseq: Health, Safety, Environment, and Quality (HSEQ) Policy
sustainability.safetyFirstDesc: We target zero accidents shore and sea, providing secure work environments through regular crew training and emergency drills.
sustainability.ecoDesc: Integrating modern, fuel-efficient technologies on our vessels to protect marine life and reduce carbon footprint in line with IMO targets.
sustainability.complianceDesc: Guaranteeing full adherence to international maritime codes, conventions, and regulations, including SOLAS, MARPOL, MLC, and the ISM Code.

n1.title: Tom Explorer Joins the Fleet
n1.summary: Our newly built 63,200 DWT Ultramax bulk carrier, Tom Explorer, has been successfully taken under technical management and has commenced her maiden voyage.

n2.title: Carbon Intensity Indicator (CII) Training
n2.summary: We conducted a virtual workshop for all technical superintendents and seagoing officers to ensure complete alignment with IMO's new CII and EEXI rating schemes.

n3.title: Expanding Our Head Office in Üsküdar
n3.summary: To support our growing fleet and operations, we have expanded our main office space and welcomed new industry experts to our commercial and technical departments.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Common inquiries regarding dry bulk vessel management and our operational guidelines.
faq.q1: What types of cargo does Tom Shipping typically manage?
faq.a1: Our managed fleet serves the international dry bulk sector. The primary cargoes handled include grains (wheat, corn), coal, iron ore, cement, agricultural fertilizers, and steel products.
faq.q2: Are your managed vessels compliant with modern IMO carbon standards?
faq.a2: Yes. Every vessel under our oversight is fully outfitted to comply with the latest IMO CII (Carbon Intensity Indicator) and EEXI rating schemes, continuously tracked by telemetry software.
faq.q3: How do you coordinate crew training and MLC compliance?
faq.a3: Our crew members are recruited in full compliance with MLC (Maritime Labour Convention) guidelines. Mariners undergo regular emergency drills, STCW certifications, and navigational simulator refreshers.
faq.q4: Do you provide 24/7 technical transparency for owners?
faq.a4: Yes. Guided by our commitment to transparent governance, we provide ship owners with live digital dashboard logs, direct daily technical superintendent briefs, and audited financial reporting.

heroLogistics.title: Your Trusted Partner in Global Ocean Transport
heroLogistics.subtitle: Tom Shipping delivers high efficiency and modern bulk carrier management solutions aligned with global maritime standards.

floatingWidgetInfo.fleetDesc: Our modern dry bulk fleet comprises Handysize, Supramax, and Ultramax vessels, fully compliant with international classification standards.
floatingWidgetInfo.servicesDesc: We coordinate planned maintenance systems (PMS), crew rotation, and dry cargo chartering operations under a single roof.

transportSolutions.title: Ocean Transport Services & Solutions
transportSolutions.subtitle: No matter your target market or commodity, Tom Shipping provides global shipping solutions tailored to support your business growth.
transportSolutions.cardSpotDesc: We transport grains, coal, iron ore, cement, and steel products securely to global discharge ports.
transportSolutions.cardContractDesc: Offering flexible chartering contracts to secure our clients' supply chains and transport programs.
transportSolutions.cardTechDesc: We maintain vessels at premium mechanical standards via planned maintenance and routine dry-docking.
transportSolutions.cardCrewDesc: Providing certified, experienced marine officers and crew who prioritize safety and seaworthiness.
transportSolutions.cardSafetyDesc: 100% adherence to SOLAS and MARPOL codes with a dedication to zero incidents and environmental protection.
transportSolutions.cardDecarbDesc: Advanced telemetry and route optimization tools to keep vessels fully compliant with IMO CII rating limits.

corporateNetwork.networkDesc: Through our global port connections, experienced superintendents, and dedicated chartering desk, we set reliable dry bulk standards.
corporateNetwork.trendDesc: Integrating eco-efficient technologies on our managed vessels to minimize carbon footprints and protect ocean biomes.
